entries.title: Commentary on Jeremiah on jeremiah 7:19
entries.excerpt: (Verse 19) Do they provoke me to anger? says the Lord. Do they not provoke themselves, to their own shame? The wretched fools do not understand that this dispute does not harm me, whom anger never affects: but it brings upon themselves confusion of their own countenance, and everlasting dishonor. Therefore, whatever we do, we do not harm God, who can never be harmed: but we prepare destruction for ourselves, storing up wrath for the day of wrath. Therefore, He established different duties for sons, fathers, mothers, and even wives, so that no age would dissent from impiety.
